title.en: Ye Tian used the treasures of the Hanhai Yellow...

content.en:
"This Black Abyss Giant Beast's true blood has been exhausted, I have to test how far my life level has been raised!"

Ye Tian used the treasures of the Hanhai Yellow Tower to test his life level.

Soon, the life level test came out.

【8.5】

Seeing this result, Ye Tian was very excited.

"The life level has been directly increased from 7.8 to 8.5, which is a huge increase!"

Ye Tian was very satisfied with this improvement.

Of course, with his current life level, refining the Black Abyss Behemoth was actually a waste.

Those half-step sevenfold ancestors who were extremely close to life level 9, if they used the true blood of the Black Abyss Giant Beast, they should have hope to raise their life level to this level of 9.

However, Ye Tian didn't feel wasted.

After obtaining such a treasure, he naturally has to absorb and refine it, what is the point of keeping it, he can now obtain the true blood of the Black Abyss Giant Beast, and he will have the hope of obtaining better treasures in the future.

Moreover, for the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor, the True Blood of the Black Abyss Giant Beast was not the best treasure to improve the life level.

Some half-step sevenfold ancestors who can raise their life level to 9 may not even have refined the true blood of the Black Abyss Giant Beast, so they have also been raised to life level 9!

So, he doesn't feel pity.

"Life level has reached 8.5, and I can enter any Xuanlou now!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

It's okay to stay in Hanhai Yellow Tower, but a lot of resources and information can't be compared with Xuanlou.

For him, it is better to enter a Xuanlou than to stay in the Hanhai Yellow Building.

And the strength between the Xuanlou is also uneven, some of the weaker Xuanlou only have a few Eightfold Origin Ancestors and a few formal members of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, and most of them still rely on peripheral members to expand their influence.

However, the top-notch Xuanlou has a half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor in charge, as well as a large group of Eightfold Origin Ancestors, and even a group of Eightfold Origin Ancestors among the peripheral members.

"I need to contact a few more Xuanlou to talk about the conditions. "

Ye Tian then contacted the high-level of the Xuanlou one by one, and finally chose a Xuanlou.

That's Guquan Xuanlou!

Ye Tian had been to the Guquan Xuanlou a few times, so he had some understanding of this Xuanlou, and the Guquan Xuanlou was indeed powerful enough.

At present, Guquan Xuanlou has 3,600 official members of Dao Ancestors, and tens of thousands of peripheral members, including two half-step nine-fold ancestors and thousands of eight-fold ancestors, and their strength is extremely terrifying.

The boundary of Guquan District is also far beyond the boundary of Hanhai District, which is the bottom of many regional boundaries, and the boundary of Guquan District is enough to rank among the top 50.

In addition, many half-step Eightfold Ancestors and Eightfold Ancestors in the weak community realm have entered the Guquan District Boundary, resulting in more and more Eightfold Origin Ancestors in the Guquan District Boundary.

The Hanhai District Boundary is different, in fact, many Eightfold Ancestors were born here one after another, but they all left this area boundary and went to other major regional boundaries, resulting in no Eightfold Origin Ancestors sitting in the Hanhai District Boundary at all, and occasionally a few Eightfold Ancestors stayed here for a short time.

As a result, the powerful regional boundaries have more eightfold ancestors, while the weak regional boundaries do not have eightfold ancestors at all.

"Let's go to the Guquan Xuanlou, there are not only many strong people, but also many resources, and the opportunity of the Guquan Xuanlou is also right!"

Other than that.

Ye Tian's joining Guquan Xuanlou also has benefits and treatment.

First of all, as soon as he joined the Guquan Xuanlou, he enjoyed the treatment of an official member of the Sevenfold Ancestor level, as well as an additional 1,000 points reward.

In addition, Ye Tian can also obtain a half-step eightfold ancestor-level servant to obey his instructions and commands.

The half-step eightfold ancestor can be called an invincible existence in the Hanhai region realm, and it is the top existence, but if he does not raise the life level to above 6 at the half-step sevenfold ancestor level, and condense the life path flower in the seven-fold ancestor, he will not be able to become an official member of the nine-fold building.

Even if you work hard to become a peripheral member of the Nine-Story Building, you have no status at all, you can only say that you have the Nine-Story Building as a protective umbrella.

As a result, many half-step Yae Ancestors would become servants of full members in order to have any hope of becoming Yae Ancestors.

Dao Ancestors, who are qualified to accept half-step eightfold origin ancestors as servants, have such high potential in the future, and even hope to rank among half-step ninefold origin ancestors and even ninefold origin ancestors!

Therefore, many half-step Yae Origin Ancestors also wanted to seize this opportunity.

......

Soon after, Ye Tian's application to join Guquan Xuanlou was approved.

He officially became a full member of the Ancient Spring Xuanlou.

Soon, Ye Tian came to Guquan Xuanlou, modified the information, and officially settled in Guquan Xuanlou.

Of course.

He can still return to the Hanhai Yellow Building, and even his residence in the Hanhai Yellow Mansion is reserved, and he can come back at any time.

After joining Guquan Xuanlou, Ye Tian's points were immediately issued, and his authority was promoted.

Then, he chose a half-step Yae Origin Ancestor as his servant.

"Tens of thousands of half-step eightfold ancestors!"

Ye Tian looked at the information and carefully selected.

The Nine Stories Building is very detailed about the information of these peripheral members, and they can't hide it if they want to.

Soon, Ye Tian valued a half-step eightfold ancestor.

Qingxuan Dao Ancestor, half-step eightfold original ancestor, comprehend the Ninefold Yuan Dao, and the Ninefold Yuan Dao is consummated......

"A peripheral member of the Ninefold Yuan Dao!"

Such a strong person is now reduced to the servants of the official members of the Nine-Fold Building, and I have to say that the Nine-Fold Yuan Dao is not a big deal in the Guquan District boundary.

If the Dao Ancestor of the Ninefold Yuan Dao was unable to condense the Life Dao Flower, he would not even have the hope of becoming a half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor, there would be no hope at all, and his combat effectiveness would be far inferior to that of the official members of the Ninefold Building.

For the Nine-Fold Building, such a Dao Ancestor has no cultivation value, and he is only a powerful Eightfold Ancestor in his life.

"The Life Dao Flower is so important!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

Moreover, what the Nine-Fold Building values most is the Dao Ancestor who condenses the Ninefold Life Dao Flower.

The Ninefold Life Dao Flower and the Ninefold Yuan Dao Flower can be combined, so that the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor has the hope of stepping into the realm of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor.

If it is an eightfold life path flower, it is not compatible with the ninefold yuan dao flower, and it cannot become a ninefold dao ancestor.

Unless it is to raise the Eightfold Life Dao Flower to the level of the Ninefold Life Dao Flower in the future, this is almost impossible.

Therefore, if you want to become a Ninefold Primordial Ancestor, it is best to raise the life level to above 9 in the half-step Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor realm.

This is also the only hope!

Of course, if it is the eightfold life path flower that is comprehended, there is no way to improve it, and when impacting the eightfold origin ancestor realm, instead of condensing the ninefold yuan dao flower, he uses a special method to reduce the condensation of the eightfold yuan dao flower, which is also a hope.

It's just that when the time comes, even if he breaks through and becomes a Ninefold Ancestor, he will still be a weak Ninefold Ancestor.

If you take this road, you will be kicked directly by the Nine-Folded Building, and the Nine-Folded Building doesn't want such a Dao Ancestor!

Subsequently.

Ye Tian handed over the news and chose Qingxuan Daozu as his servant.

Having a half-step Yae Ancestor as a servant also has many advantages, at least he can handle a lot of trivial matters, and he doesn't need to do it himself.

And for now, the strength of a half-step Eightfold Ancestor can far surpass him, and it is also a huge help!
